race.comment: The penny has dropped for GOLDEN EYES (8) who has put back-to-back wins together and is racing high on confidence of late. Rider Thompson has been in the saddle for both victories and stays on board today. Should get a gun run from gate two and the step-up in trip suits. Goes on top. GOLDEN SMILE (6) brings NSW form to the equation and has placed two of three when second-up. Looms as the main danger. STRANGLEHOLD (1) is a bit hit or miss but is more than capable enough on his day. Include with the 2kg claim. POWER PACK (4) has placed two of two over this staying journey and looks a must for the exotics players.
